The Finance desk is working from a mixed packet: current request rows, calendar residue, messenger excerpts

A strong operator can move the clean items without letting soft approvals, delegated language, or old runner examples shape the handoff style.

The desk lead cares about throughput, but downstream systems interpret structured rows literal
